rashi.name: Rashi
rashi.approach: Peshat (literal meaning) with selected Midrashic insights
rashi.bio: The most fundamental Torah commentator. Rashi's commentary is studied by beginners and scholars alike. He focuses on the plain meaning of the text while incorporating essential Midrashic teachings.

ramban.name: Ramban
ramban.bio: A master of both revealed and hidden Torah. Ramban brings depth, philosophy, and Kabbalistic wisdom to his commentary, often disagreeing respectfully with Rashi.

ibn_ezra.name: Ibn Ezra
ibn_ezra.bio: A scholar of grammar, astronomy, and mathematics. Ibn Ezra's commentary is concise, rational, and often cryptic, focusing on the precise meaning of Hebrew words.

sforno.name: Sforno
sforno.approach: Moral and ethical teachings from the text
sforno.bio: An Italian Renaissance scholar who emphasized the ethical messages in Torah. Sforno focuses on human free will and moral development.

or_hachaim.name: Or HaChaim
or_hachaim.bio: Known for his warm, mystical approach that inspires love of Torah. The Or HaChaim's commentary is beloved for its depth and spiritual elevation.

kli_yakar.name: Kli Yakar
kli_yakar.bio: A powerful preacher who used Torah commentary to address moral issues of his time. Kli Yakar finds timeless ethical lessons in every verse.

ohr_hachaim.name: Ohr HaChaim
ohr_hachaim.approach: Mystical devotion and love of Torah
ohr_hachaim.bio: The Ohr HaChaim HaKadosh (the Holy Light of Life) wrote one of the most beloved mystical commentaries. His warm approach inspires deep connection with Torah and brings spiritual elevation to every verse.

rashbam.name: Rashbam
rashbam.bio: Rashi's grandson, Rashbam often disagrees with his grandfather's interpretations, insisting on the most literal meaning of the text. He emphasizes understanding verses in their grammatical and historical context.

baal_haturim.name: Baal HaTurim
baal_haturim.bio: Famous for revealing hidden connections through gematria (numerical values of Hebrew letters). The Baal HaTurim uncovers remarkable patterns showing how every word and letter of Torah is precisely chosen.

alshich.name: Alshich
alshich.bio: A student of the Arizal in mystical Safed, the Alshich weaves beautiful sermons from every verse. His commentary reads like poetry, transforming Torah into practical wisdom for daily spiritual growth.
